creator: gibbs@scsiguy.com
text:
>>Synopsis:       Advansys SCSI driver crashes random userland progs w/SIGPROF

In all likelyhood, this has nothing to do with the AdvanSys controller.
It smells like a faulty or overclocked CPU or faulty RAM.  Performing disk
I/O is quite memory intensive (lots of DMA active), so RAM is where I
would start looking first.

--
Justin
